name: @clawrun/agent
description: Abstract Agent interface and registry for ClawRun
author: Afshin Mehrabani

scripts.build: tsc && for f in src/tools/*/SKILL.md; do d="dist/tools/$(basename $(dirname $f))"; mkdir -p "$d" && cp "$f" "$d/"; done 2>/dev/null || true && for f in dist/tools/*/skill-finder.js; do [ -f "$f" ] && sed -i'' '1s;^;#!/usr/bin/env node\n;' "$f"; done 2>/dev/null || true
